g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Internet traffic is routed through VLAN 10 in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What internal network traffic is routed through VLAN 20?')
sendPrompt('How is IPAddressPool vlan-10-pool and L2Advertisement vlan-10-adv configured for enp7s0.10?')
sendPrompt('How is IPAddressPool vlan-20-pool and L2Advertisement vlan-20-adv configured for enp7s0.20?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.10 (VLAN 10, 192.168.10.11/24) configured on worker1 via NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.20 (VLAN 20, 192.168.20.11/24) configured on worker1 via NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.10 (VLAN 10, 192.168.10.12/24) configured on worker2 via NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.20 (VLAN 20, 192.168.20.12/24) configured on worker2 via NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How does the LoadBalancer Service in vlan10udn use the metallb.universe.tf/loadBalancerIPs annotation to claim 192.168.10.101?')
sendPrompt('How does the hello-openshift pod in vlan10udn get its IP from the UDN subnet 172.16.10.0/24 via the ovn-udn1 interface?')
sendPrompt('Why does OVN use the UDN EndpointSlice (172.16.10.x) rather than the default network slice (10.131.x.x) for forwarding?')
sendPrompt('How does the LoadBalancer Service in vlan20udn use the metallb.universe.tf/loadBalancerIPs annotation to claim 192.168.20.101?')
sendPrompt('How does the hello-openshift pod in vlan20udn get its IP from the UDN subnet 172.16.20.0/24 via the ovn-udn1 interface?')
sendPrompt('Why does OVN use the UDN EndpointSlice (172.16.20.x) rather than the default network slice (10.131.x.x) for forwarding?')

svg.text: ★ OVN forwards to UDN IP, not eth0
